summary: PDF Export feature for /report/eventi tested successfully. New 'Scarica PDF' button present and functional. /report/azienda remains intact. No regressions in Report Eventi module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export for Report Eventi verified working. Both /report/eventi and /report/azienda pages functional with all features intact.

report_eventi_pdf_click_no_crash.details: Clicking PDF button does not crash page, no error displayed

report_eventi_excel_button.details: Excel button still present and functional (no regression)

report_eventi_kpi_cards.details: 4/4 KPI cards present (Eventi, Ospiti, Ricavi, Ticket)

report_eventi_charts.details: 4/4 charts present (Ricavi, Eventi, Ospiti, Tipi per mese)

report_eventi_filters.details: Year, date range, type, and location filters working

report_eventi_preview_table.details: Preview table with monthly data present

report_azienda_page_intact.details: /report/azienda loads with FASE 3 badge, hero, filters, policy banner, KPI cards

report_azienda_export_buttons.details: Export Excel and Export PDF buttons present and functional

sidebar_both_reports.details: Sidebar shows both 'Report Operativo' and 'Report Eventi' links

ui_verification.report_eventi_page: Title 'Report Eventi', description, Scarica Excel + Scarica PDF buttons, filters card, 4 KPI cards, 4 charts, preview table
ui_verification.report_azienda_page: Hero with FASE 3 badge, Export Excel + Export PDF buttons, filters, policy banner, KPI cards, charts

code_review.eventi_pdf_ts: Clean implementation using pdfmake, proper filtering, client-side PDF generation
code_review.eventi_page_tsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes, error handling for PDF download
